MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING ON PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 24, 2013 AT 9:30 AM WHEN ANOTHER JUDGE WILL BE SITTING IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE MILLER IS RECUSED. (THE COURT RECEIVED A COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling on PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & COMPANY's Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award. Per order of the Presiding Judge, the matter is continued to September 24, 2013 at 9:30 am when another judge will be sitting in Dept. 302. Judge Miller is recused. (The Court received a copy of the proof of service.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
